name: @treeui/mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server and AI catalog for TreeUI.

scripts.build: pnpm run generate:catalog && pnpm exec rimraf dist && pnpm exec tsup src/index.ts src/cli.ts --format esm,cjs --dts
scripts.test: pnpm -w exec vitest run packages/mcp/src/catalog.test.ts packages/mcp/src/server.test.ts
